proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher ECOG performance status (worse functional status) is associated with a lower probability of objective_response in this AML cohort.

analyses.result_summary: Mean ecog_ps in responders=0.655 vs non-responders=0.826 (diff=-0.170, t-test p=2.608e-103).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Greater weight_loss_pct_6mo (more recent weight loss) is associated with lower mean objective_response.

analyses.result_summary: Mean weight loss in responders=3.383% vs non-responders=3.952% (diff=-0.569, p=7.202e-39).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher blast_pct_marrow (greater marrow blast burden at baseline) is associated with lower probability of objective_response.
Higher wbc_k_per_ul (greater leukocyte count at presentation) is associated with lower probability of objective_response.

analyses.result_summary: Mean blast % in responders=58.23 vs non-responders=60.31 (diff=-2.08, p=9.501e-20).
Mean WBC in responders=19.07 vs non-responders=20.40 (diff=-1.33, p=1.298e-05).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher serum albumin_g_dl (better nutritional status) is associated with higher probability of objective_response.
Higher serum crp_mg_l (greater systemic inflammation) is associated with lower probability of objective_response.

analyses.result_summary: Mean albumin: responders=3.825 vs non=3.796 (diff=+0.029, p=1.304e-06).
Mean CRP: responders=5.65 vs non=6.17 (diff=-0.51, p=4.373e-07).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with idh1_mutation==1 have a higher objective_response rate than patients without IDH1 mutation.

analyses.result_summary: Response rate IDH1+=0.221 vs IDH1-=0.165 (diff=+0.0563, chi2 p=3.518e-18).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with npm1_mutation==1 have a higher objective_response rate than patients without it (clinically NPM1 favorable; TP53 and complex karyotype unfavorable).
Patients with tp53_mutation==1 have a lower objective_response rate than patients without it (clinically NPM1 favorable; TP53 and complex karyotype unfavorable).
Patients with complex_karyotype==1 have a lower objective_response rate than patients without it (clinically NPM1 favorable; TP53 and complex karyotype unfavorable).

analyses.result_summary: Response rate npm1_mutation+=0.1732 vs npm1_mutation-=0.1673 (diff=+0.0059, p=0.1092).
Response rate tp53_mutation+=0.1657 vs tp53_mutation-=0.1694 (diff=-0.0037, p=0.5197).
Response rate complex_karyotype+=0.1681 vs complex_karyotype-=0.1692 (diff=-0.0012, p=0.8179).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with idh1_mutation==1, those who receive treatment_ivosidenib have a higher objective_response rate than IDH1+ patients who do not (positive multiplicative interaction).

analyses.result_summary: Cell rates: IDH1-/ivo-=0.164; IDH1-/ivo+=0.171; IDH1+/ivo-=0.225; IDH1+/ivo+=0.174. Interaction log-OR=-0.364, p=0.02706.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with idh2_mutation==1, those receiving treatment_enasidenib have a higher objective_response rate than IDH2+ patients who do not (positive multiplicative interaction).

analyses.result_summary: Cell rates: IDH2-/ena-=0.170; IDH2-/ena+=0.163; IDH2+/ena-=0.167; IDH2+/ena+=0.144. Interaction log-OR=-0.124, p=0.4477.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with flt3_itd==1, those receiving treatment_midostaurin have a higher objective_response rate than FLT3-ITD+ patients without that drug (positive interaction).
Among patients with flt3_itd==1, those receiving treatment_gilteritinib have a higher objective_response rate than FLT3-ITD+ patients without that drug (positive interaction).

analyses.result_summary: Cell rates flt3_itd × treatment_midostaurin: (0,0)=0.168 (0,1)=0.170 (1,0)=0.174 (1,1)=0.161. Interaction log-OR=-0.105, p=0.2185.
Cell rates flt3_itd × treatment_gilteritinib: (0,0)=0.170 (0,1)=0.162 (1,0)=0.172 (1,1)=0.169. Interaction log-OR=+0.034, p=0.6861.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients flagged unfit_for_intensive==1, treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine raises objective_response rate more than it does in fit patients (positive interaction).
Older age_years is associated with a lower probability of objective_response.
Female patients (sex_female==1) and male patients have different objective_response rates.

analyses.result_summary: Mean age responders=68.03 vs non=67.98 (diff=+0.05, p=0.7168).
Response rate female=0.1709 vs male=0.1675 (diff=+0.0033, p=0.3263).

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for age, ECOG, AML genetics, baseline labs, and treatments, ecog_ps is independently associated with a lower log-odds of objective_response.
After adjusting for age, ECOG, AML genetics, baseline labs, and treatments, weight_loss_pct_6mo is independently associated with a lower log-odds of objective_response.
After adjusting for age, ECOG, AML genetics, baseline labs, and treatments, blast_pct_marrow is independently associated with a lower log-odds of objective_response.
After adjusting for age, ECOG, AML genetics, baseline labs, and treatments, idh1_mutation is independently associated with a higher log-odds of objective_response.
After adjusting for age, ECOG, AML genetics, baseline labs, and treatments, albumin_g_dl is independently associated with a higher log-odds of objective_response.
After adjusting for age, ECOG, AML genetics, baseline labs, and treatments, crp_mg_l is independently associated with a lower log-odds of objective_response.
After adjusting for age, ECOG, AML genetics, baseline labs, and treatments, wbc_k_per_ul is independently associated with a lower log-odds of objective_response.
After adjusting for age, ECOG, AML genetics, baseline labs, and treatments, treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine is independently associated with a higher log-odds of objective_response.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted log-OR for ecog_ps=-0.3835, p=9.897e-97.
Adjusted log-OR for weight_loss_pct_6mo=-0.0403, p=1.135e-34.
Adjusted log-OR for blast_pct_marrow=-0.0058, p=6.186e-20.
Adjusted log-OR for idh1_mutation=+0.3602, p=2.563e-17.
Adjusted log-OR for albumin_g_dl=+0.1181, p=9.083e-07.
Adjusted log-OR for crp_mg_l=-0.0072, p=1.446e-06.
Adjusted log-OR for wbc_k_per_ul=-0.0022, p=1.119e-05.
Adjusted log-OR for treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine=+0.0590, p=0.01598.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving treatment_midostaurin have a different objective_response rate than patients not receiving that treatment.
Patients receiving treatment_gilteritinib have a different objective_response rate than patients not receiving that treatment.
Patients receiving treatment_ivosidenib have a different objective_response rate than patients not receiving that treatment.
Patients receiving treatment_enasidenib have a different objective_response rate than patients not receiving that treatment.
Patients receiving treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine have a different objective_response rate than patients not receiving that treatment.
Patients receiving treatment_7plus3 have a different objective_response rate than patients not receiving that treatment.

analyses.result_summary: Response rate treatment_midostaurin+=0.1686 vs treatment_midostaurin-=0.1691 (diff=-0.0005, p=0.9228).
Response rate treatment_gilteritinib+=0.1630 vs treatment_gilteritinib-=0.1701 (diff=-0.0071, p=0.1344).
Response rate treatment_ivosidenib+=0.1709 vs treatment_ivosidenib-=0.1689 (diff=+0.0020, p=0.7625).
Response rate treatment_enasidenib+=0.1611 vs treatment_enasidenib-=0.1697 (diff=-0.0086, p=0.1724).
Response rate treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine+=0.1735 vs treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine-=0.1661 (diff=+0.0074, p=0.03149).
Response rate treatment_7plus3+=0.1702 vs treatment_7plus3-=0.1681 (diff=+0.0021, p=0.5397).

Higher pain_nrs (worse symptom burden) is associated with a lower probability of objective_response.
Higher dyspnea_grade (worse symptom burden) is associated with a lower probability of objective_response.
Higher cough_grade (worse symptom burden) is associated with a lower probability of objective_response.
Higher appetite_loss_grade (worse symptom burden) is associated with a lower probability of objective_response.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with rural_residence==1 have a different objective_response rate than non-rural patients.
More years of education_years are associated with a higher probability of objective_response.
Objective_response rate differs across insurance_type categories (medicare vs private vs medicaid vs uninsured).
Objective_response rate differs across race_ethnicity categories.

analyses.result_summary: Response rate rural+=0.1691 vs rural-=0.1690 (diff=+0.0000, p=1).

Response rates by race_ethnicity: {'asian': 0.1633, 'black': 0.1574, 'hispanic': 0.167, 'other': 0.1472, 'white': 0.1728}; chi2 p=0.009595.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher prior_lines_of_therapy (more heavily pretreated / longer disease course) is associated with lower probability of objective_response.
Higher years_since_diagnosis (more heavily pretreated / longer disease course) is associated with lower probability of objective_response.
Patients with prior_chemotherapy==1 have a different objective_response rate than patients without prior exposure to that modality.
Patients with prior_radiation==1 have a different objective_response rate than patients without prior exposure to that modality.
Patients with prior_surgery==1 have a different objective_response rate than patients without prior exposure to that modality.
Patients with prior_immunotherapy==1 have a different objective_response rate than patients without prior exposure to that modality.
Patients with prior_targeted_therapy==1 have a different objective_response rate than patients without prior exposure to that modality.

analyses.result_summary: Mean prior_lines_of_therapy: responders=1.254 vs non=1.245 (diff=+0.009, p=0.5162).
Mean years_since_diagnosis: responders=1.942 vs non=1.981 (diff=-0.039, p=0.05221).
Response rate prior_chemotherapy+=0.1680 vs prior_chemotherapy-=0.1699 (diff=-0.0018, p=0.596).
Response rate prior_radiation+=0.1651 vs prior_radiation-=0.1707 (diff=-0.0056, p=0.1297).
Response rate prior_surgery+=0.1726 vs prior_surgery-=0.1671 (diff=+0.0055, p=0.12).
Response rate prior_immunotherapy+=0.1717 vs prior_immunotherapy-=0.1686 (diff=+0.0031, p=0.514).
Response rate prior_targeted_therapy+=0.1702 vs prior_targeted_therapy-=0.1689 (diff=+0.0013, p=0.8192).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The favorable association of idh1_mutation with objective_response persists after adjustment for treatment received and other prognostic features (i.e., IDH1 acts as a prognostic factor independent of ivosidenib).
After multivariable adjustment, the idh1_mutation × treatment_ivosidenib interaction is positive: ivosidenib amplifies the favorable IDH1 effect.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted log-OR for idh1_mutation=+0.360, p=2.563e-17; adjusted log-OR for treatment_ivosidenib=+0.018, p=0.6883.
Adjusted interaction log-OR=-0.357, p=0.03161.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The negative association between ecog_ps and objective_response is more pronounced among patients receiving treatment_7plus3 (induction chemo) than among those who do not (negative interaction).

analyses.result_summary:
Response rate by ecog × 7+3:
treatment_7plus3         0         1
ecog_ps                             
0                 0.210488  0.215838
1                 0.154654  0.155812
2                 0.111766  0.112002
Interaction log-OR=-0.018, p=0.6312.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with both low albumin (alb_low=1, albumin below median) AND high CRP (crp_high=1, CRP above median) have an even lower objective_response rate than expected from the additive sum of the two main effects (positive interaction => synergistic risk).

analyses.result_summary:
Response rate by alb_low × crp_high:
crp_high         0         1
alb_low                     
0         0.181509  0.169471
1         0.166000  0.156927
Interaction log-OR=+0.016, p=0.736.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The favorable effect of idh1_mutation on objective_response differs between female (sex_female==1) and male patients (i.e., a sex_female × idh1_mutation interaction is non-zero).

analyses.result_summary:
Response rate by sex × IDH1:
idh1_mutation         0         1
sex_female                       
0              0.163175  0.223500
1              0.167157  0.218596
Interaction log-OR=-0.057, p=0.4966.

proposed_hypotheses.text: A multivariable logistic model trained on baseline features (age, ECOG, AML genetics, labs, treatment) discriminates objective_response: patients in the top predicted-probability quartile have a higher observed response rate than those in the bottom quartile.

analyses.code: Logit -> predicted prob; cut into quartiles; compare observed rates
analyses.result_summary: Observed response by quartile of predicted prob: Q1=0.112 Q2=0.147 Q3=0.184 Q4=0.233; chi2 p=2.392e-154; Q4-Q1 diff=+0.121.
